title: rhododendron × diphrocalyx
intro: Rhododendron × diphrocalyx, a hybrid rhododendron plant, is a cross between Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron luteum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rhododendron × diphrocalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and its ability to improve digestion and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Rhododendron × diphrocalyx is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
